name: Virtuix Holdings Inc.
business: Virtuix Holdings Inc. sells omni-directional treadmills for virtual reality applications, including the Omni One for consumers and enterprise, and Virtual Terrain Walk (VTW) for defense mission planning. The company targets consumer, enterprise, and defense markets.
namedCustomers: U.S. Military Academy at West Point

exposures.sentence: We are the creator of Omni, the premier brand of omni-directional treadmills that enable users to walk and run in 360 degrees inside virtual reality ( VR ) games, digital twins, and other applications.
Virtual Terrain Walk ( VTW ) is our multi-user system for next-generation mission planning in the defense industry.

catalysts.sentence: we expect the closure process to be completed in the quarter ending September 30, 2026.
